itinerary.title: Leisure Odisha Spiritual Serenity Coastal Calm
itinerary.overview:
LEISURE ODISHA • SPIRITUAL SERENITY & COASTAL CALM Welcome to a beautifully paced, soul-stirring escape curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Embark on the finest Odisha Senior Citizen Tour, intentionally customized to balance relaxation, gentle pacing, and spiritual fulfillment. As your premium travel consultants, TRAGUIN elevates your journey with handpicked hotels, smooth luxury transportation, and highly personalized assistance. Discover the stunning TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Itinerary — OD-007 1 architectural heritage of Bhubaneswar, feel the spiritual energy at the holy Jagannath Temple in Puri, and gaze at the breathtaking landscapes of Chilika Lake. Every detail is planned to ensure a stress-free experience, leaving you with sweet, unforgettable memories.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This bespoke luxury holiday package is meticulously designed for senior travelers who deserve the utmost comfort, premium stays, and a relaxed, unhurried sightseeing experience. Traveling in a premium, smooth- riding AC vehicle with an experienced, patient chauffeur, you will move effortlessly from spiritual sanctuaries to scenic coastal paths. Enjoy a customized meal plan that highlights fresh, easily digestible gourmet meals across daily breakfasts and dinners. With our specialized TRAGUIN curated experience note, you will receive priority assistance, specialized temple pandas for hassle-free darshan, and dedicated ground support at every stage.

WHY VISIT
When arranging a Luxury Odisha Holiday, travelers look for deep-rooted heritage, smooth accessibility, and peaceful, uncrowded natural retreats. Odisha offers a unique architectural and cultural canvas. From the spectacular sun-temple architecture of Konark—an iconic attraction known worldwide—to the sacred shrines forming the temple city of Bhubaneswar, Odisha sightseeing provides profound enrichment. For seniors and multi-generational families planning an Odisha Family Tour or a peaceful Odisha Honeymoon Package, the region reveals incredible locations. Spend quiet hours watching dolphins at Chilika Lake, the largest coastal lagoon in India, or enjoying a calm sunset walk along the golden sand banks of Puri Beach. From authentic handloom shopping to savoring the holy Mahaprasad, our signature TRAGUIN Odisha Packages blend premium comfort with exclusive experiences, making this the absolute best time to visit Odisha with complete peace of mind.
itinerary.seo_title: OD-007 | Leisure Odisha Spiritual Serenity Coastal Calm | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Odisha package (OD-007 / TRG-ODI-007): Bhubaneswar • Puri • Konark • Chilika Lake (Satapada) with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR — WELCOME TO THE TEMPLE CITY – ARCHITECTURAL MARVELS
Day 02: BHUBANESWAR TO PURI VIA DHAULI & SAKSHIGOPAL — JOURNEY OF PEACE – EMOTIONAL SPIRITUAL STORYTELLING
Day 03: PURI JAGANNATH TEMPLE DARSHAN & KONARK EXCURSION — SACRED DEVOTION & THE CHRONICLES OF THE SUN GOD
Day 04: CHILIKA LAKE (SATAPADA) EXCURSION — BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES & IMMERSIVE WETLAND ECO-TOUR
Day 05: PURI TO BHUBANESWAR / DEPARTURE — RETURNING WITH PEACE & UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private, exclusive entry to the award-winning Raghurajpur heritage artisan village for an immersive art demonstration.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: A thoroughly relaxed pacing that avoids early morning rush hours, designed with care for senior comfort.
Personalized Assistance: Dedicated local coordination desk providing seamless wheel-chair booking and assistance whenever required.
Luxury Transportation: Expert drivers well-trained in smooth highway driving, offering regular comfort stops along the way.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR — WELCOME TO THE TEMPLE CITY – ARCHITECTURAL MARVELS
days.description: Your premium Odisha experience begins as you arrive at Bhubaneswar Airport, where a dedicated private luxury transport vehicle waits to receive you with a warm welcome. Check into your premium handpicked hotel and take time to relax. In the afternoon, enjoy a slow, effortless tour of the historic Lingaraj Temple and the ancient rock-cut caves of Khandagiri and Udayagiri, which boast beautiful landscape views of the city. 2
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Lingaraj Temple complex, Udayagiri and Khandagiri twin rock heritage caves.
Evening Experience:  Bespoke welcome dinner featuring authentic, lightly spiced regional delicacies.
Meals Included:  Welcome Drink & Fine Dining Dinner

days.title: BHUBANESWAR TO PURI VIA DHAULI & SAKSHIGOPAL — JOURNEY OF PEACE – EMOTIONAL SPIRITUAL STORYTELLING
days.description: Relish a lavish morning breakfast before heading towards the holy coastal city of Puri. En route, make a gentle stop at Dhauli Shanti Stupa, a magnificent white peace pagoda overlooking the tranquil plains where the historic Kalinga war ended. The site features smooth, senior-friendly walking pathways. Continue your drive past scenic rural landscapes to visit the holy Sakshigopal Temple before checking into your premium beachside resort in Puri.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Dhauli Peace Pagoda, Sakshigopal Temple, Private Puri Beach access area.
Evening Experience:  Relaxing beachside seating with fresh coconut water, listening to the gentle ocean waves.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Riverside / Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Dinner

days.title: PURI JAGANNATH TEMPLE DARSHAN & KONARK EXCURSION — SACRED DEVOTION & THE CHRONICLES OF THE SUN GOD
days.description: Experience a deeply moving morning with a VIP assisted darshan at the world-renowned Jagannath Temple, arranged carefully by specialized guides to avoid long queues. Witness the timeless rituals and soak in the spiritual energy. In the afternoon, take a smooth drive along the Marine Drive highway to the Konark Sun Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage site built as a colossal cosmic chariot. Marvel at the intricate stone carvings while your guide shares fascinating historical stories.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Shree Jagannath Temple, Konark Sun Temple, Chandrabhaga Beach.
Optional Activities:  Experiencing the legendary Mahaprasad lunch inside a comfortable dining venue.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Riverside / Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Authentic Buffet Dinner

days.title: CHILIKA LAKE (SATAPADA) EXCURSION — BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES & IMMERSIVE WETLAND ECO-TOUR
days.description: Enjoy a relaxed breakfast and head out to Satapada on Chilika Lake, an absolute paradise of breathtaking landscapes and calm waters. Step onto a private, stable luxury boat booked exclusively for your family. Glide across the tranquil waters to spot the rare Irrawaddy dolphins and watch beautiful migratory birds. The gentle breeze and peaceful water make this an exceptionally therapeutic day for senior travelers.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Chilika Lake Boat Cruise, Dolphin Viewpoint, Sea Mouth island stop.
Evening Experience:  An interactive evening visiting Raghurajpur Heritage Crafts Village to see Pattachitra
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Riverside / Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Farewell Dinner Celebration

days.title: PURI TO BHUBANESWAR / DEPARTURE — RETURNING WITH PEACE & UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
days.description: Savor a peaceful breakfast by the sea as your leisure holiday winds to a gentle close. Pack your bags comfortably before your private luxury transportation vehicle drives you smoothly back along the clean national highway to Bhubaneswar Airport. Leave with a deeply refreshed spirit, a heart filled with divine blessings, and unforgettable memories designed with love by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included:  Private luxury door-to-door highway airport drop-off.

TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated relationship executive checking in daily.
